headline: Is FICO’s UltraFICO Cash-Flow Push Quietly Redefining Its Data Moat And Pricing Power? (FICO)
summary: Earlier in May 2026, FICO launched the next-generation UltraFICO Score, combining its traditional scoring model with real-time, consumer-permissioned cash flow data via Plaid to give lenders a richer, operationally simple view of credit risk. This move not only underscores FICO’s push into open-banking-style data, but also positions the company to address financial inclusion concerns by helping lenders assess consumers with thin or uneven credit files more precisely. We’ll now examine how...
